title: YawningFace block config (v1)
description: The cross-device contract. One document per user; the cloud stores it verbatim (last write wins); every client evaluates it locally. Unknown fields must be preserved round-trip.

exceptions.description: Reserved for v2 (temporary allowances / smart friction). Always [] in v1.

timeZone.description: IANA zone name. Informational in v1: clients evaluate in their own local time.

timePeriods.description: Active windows. Empty or missing = always active while enabled.

endTime.description: Exclusive end. Equal to startTime = whole day; earlier than startTime = crosses midnight.

schedule.description: Days this window starts on. For an overnight window, blocking continues into the following morning. Empty = every day.

websites.description: Bare domains, e.g. "twitter.com". Clients match subdomains too.

apps.description: App names as reported by the OS, e.g. "Discord".
